tasks.title: Verify build with RonenMars/libgit2 dependency
tasks.description: Run swift package update, swift build, and swift test to verify the RonenMars/libgit2 fork compiles cleanly via SPM
tasks.details: Execute: swift package update && swift build && swift test. This is the first critical step to verify the libgit2 C sources compile correctly. May take 1-2 minutes on first build. If errors occur, categorize as: missing header (add to headerSearchPath), undeclared identifier (add #define to git2_features.h), duplicate symbol (add to exclude list), or compiler warnings (add -Wno-* flags). Fix any issues in RonenMars/libgit2 repo, push changes, then swift package update in Gitty.
tasks.testStrategy: Success criteria: swift build && swift test returns zero errors and all existing tests pass

tasks.title: Extract RebaseResult to Models directory
tasks.description: Move RebaseResult enum from Repository+Rebase.swift to a dedicated Models/RebaseResult.swift file
tasks.details: Create Sources/Gitty/Models/RebaseResult.swift and move the RebaseResult enum definition from Repository+Rebase.swift. Update import statements in Repository+Rebase.swift. Leave CherryPickResult in Repository+CherryPick.swift as it's fine where it is. Follow the pattern of other model files with proper Sendable conformance.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify swift build succeeds and all existing rebase tests continue to pass

tasks.title: Simplify unstage implementation
tasks.description: Refactor unstage(paths:) in Repository+Stage.swift to remove dead buf variable and simplify nested logic
tasks.details: Current implementation has redundant nested logic. Simplify to: When HEAD exists, use git_reset_default to reset index entry to HEAD state. When no HEAD (initial repo), use git_index_remove_bypath to remove from index. Remove the unused buf variable and streamline the control flow.
tasks.testStrategy: Add testUnstage to RepositoryTests.swift covering both HEAD exists and initial repo scenarios

tasks.title: Create comprehensive BranchTests
tasks.description: Implement BranchTests.swift with full coverage of branch operations
tasks.details: Create Tests/GittyTests/BranchTests.swift following the exact pattern from RepositoryTests.swift with withTempDir helper and author signature. Test scenarios: create branch, list local+remote branches, delete branch, rename branch, checkout branch. Use Repository.initialize(at:) for test repos, never network clones.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all branch operations work correctly with proper error handling and edge cases

tasks.title: Create comprehensive TagTests
tasks.description: Implement TagTests.swift with full coverage of tag operations
tasks.details: Create Tests/GittyTests/TagTests.swift following the testing pattern. Test scenarios: lightweight tag creation, annotated tag creation, list tags, delete tags. Use local repositories only, no network operations.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify both lightweight and annotated tag creation, listing, and deletion work correctly

tasks.title: Create comprehensive RemoteTests
tasks.description: Implement RemoteTests.swift with full coverage of remote operations without network
tasks.details: Create Tests/GittyTests/RemoteTests.swift. Test scenarios: add remote, remove remote, rename remote, list remotes. Use local bare repositories for testing: Repository.initialize(at: bareDir, bare: true), then repo.remotes.add(name: 'origin', url: bareDir.path). No actual network operations.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify remote management operations work with local bare repositories as remote targets

tasks.title: Create comprehensive WorktreeTests
tasks.description: Implement WorktreeTests.swift with full coverage of worktree operations
tasks.details: Create Tests/GittyTests/WorktreeTests.swift. Test scenarios: add worktree, list worktrees, remove worktree, lock worktree, unlock worktree. Follow the established testing patterns with proper cleanup.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all worktree operations including locking/unlocking functionality

tasks.title: Create RebaseTests and CherryPickTests
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive tests for rebase and cherry-pick operations including conflict scenarios
tasks.details: Create Tests/GittyTests/RebaseTests.swift and Tests/GittyTests/CherryPickTests.swift. Test scenarios: clean rebase, rebase with conflicts and abort, clean cherry-pick, cherry-pick with conflicts. For conflict tests, create two branches that modify the same line of the same file. Use sequential-thinking MCP before implementing conflict setups.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify both clean operations and conflict detection/resolution workflows

tasks.title: Create LogTests for AsyncSequence
tasks.description: Implement LogTests.swift to test the CommitLog AsyncSequence functionality
tasks.details: Create Tests/GittyTests/LogTests.swift. Test scenarios: AsyncSequence iteration over commits, log(from:) with specific ref, log(limit:) with count cap. Verify the async iteration works correctly and limits are respected.
tasks.testStrategy: Test AsyncSequence iteration, from parameter functionality, and limit parameter behavior

tasks.title: Implement Config API models and operations
tasks.description: Create complete Config API with ConfigEntry model, ConfigOperations, and Repository+Config extension
tasks.details: Create Sources/Gitty/Models/Config.swift with ConfigEntry struct (Sendable, Identifiable). Create Sources/Gitty/Operations/ConfigOperations.swift with get, set, setBool, list, delete methods using libgit2 functions: git_repository_config, git_config_get_string, git_config_set_string, git_config_set_bool, git_config_delete_entry, git_config_foreach. Create Sources/Gitty/Repository/Repository+Config.swift with config property. Use GitPointer pattern for all libgit2 resources.
tasks.testStrategy: Create Tests/GittyTests/ConfigTests.swift testing get/set string values, boolean values, list all entries, and delete entries

tasks.title: Implement Submodules API models and operations
tasks.description: Create complete Submodules API with Submodule model, SubmoduleOperations, and Repository+Submodule extension
tasks.details: Create Sources/Gitty/Models/Submodule.swift with Submodule struct (Sendable, Identifiable) containing name, path, url, headID properties. Create Sources/Gitty/Operations/SubmoduleOperations.swift with list, initialize, update methods using libgit2 functions: git_submodule_foreach, git_submodule_update, git_submodule_init, git_submodule_lookup, git_submodule_name, git_submodule_path, git_submodule_url, git_submodule_head_id. Create Sources/Gitty/Repository/Repository+Submodule.swift with submodules property.
tasks.testStrategy: Create Tests/GittyTests/SubmoduleTests.swift testing list, initialize, and update operations

tasks.title: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow
tasks.description: Implement .github/workflows/swift.yml for continuous integration on macOS and Linux
tasks.details: Create .github/workflows/swift.yml with jobs for both macos-15 and ubuntu-latest. macOS job: checkout, swift build -c release, swift test. Linux job: checkout, setup-swift@v2 with Swift 5.9, swift build, swift test. Ensure CI runs on push and pull_request events.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify CI workflow runs successfully on both platforms and all tests pass

tasks.title: Update version and prepare for release
tasks.description: Update Gitty.swift version to 0.1.0 and ensure all components are ready for public release
tasks.details: Update Sources/Gitty/Gitty.swift to set version = '0.1.0'. Verify Package.swift still references RonenMars/libgit2 from: '1.9.0'. Ensure swift test shows ≥50 test cases all passing. Run swift build -c release to verify release build succeeds.
tasks.testStrategy: Confirm swift test ≥50 cases passing, swift build -c release succeeds, version updated correctly

tasks.title: Create and push v0.1.0 release tag
tasks.description: Tag the repository with v0.1.0 and push to GitHub for Swift Package Index
tasks.details: Run final verification: swift test (100% green), swift build -c release (success). Create annotated tag: git tag -a v0.1.0 -m 'Initial public release'. Push with: git push origin main --tags. This makes the package available for Swift Package Manager consumption.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify tag is created and pushed successfully, package is accessible via SPM

tasks.title: Submit to Swift Package Index and finalize release
tasks.description: Submit package to Swift Package Index and configure repository metadata for discoverability
tasks.details: Submit to Swift Package Index at https://swiftpackageindex.com/add-a-package. Add GitHub repository topics: swift, git, libgit2, spm, swift-package-manager, ios, macos, git-client. Update README.md installation block to reference from: '0.1.0'. Consider posting to Swift Forums Community Showcase.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify package appears on Swift Package Index and repository is properly tagged and discoverable
